name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_TECHCLASS1_PATENT_COUNT
description: Top assignees by TechnologyClass1 category patent count. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, targetpair_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Within the Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers TechnologyClass1 category, which companies filed the most patents? Please provide the top 10.
For the Other functional combination TechnologyClass1 category, which assignees lead by patent count? Please give the top 10.
Which companies filed the most patents in the Cytokine related functional combination TechnologyClass1 category?
